name: Solar Protein™
shortDescription: Your daily vitality ritual — science-based meal replacement.
ingredients: Plant protein blend, vitamins, minerals, fiber.
usage: Replace one meal daily. Mix with water or plant milk.
warnings: Not for pregnancy or breastfeeding. Consult a professional if you have chronic conditions.
benefits: Supports daily nutrition rhythm and gentle weight management.

name: Youth Solar™
shortDescription: Glow support for skin, hair, and inner radiance.
warnings: Contains soy. Not for children under 18.
benefits: Supports youthful energy and skin vitality.

name: Longevity Solar™
shortDescription: Steady vitality for healthy, vibrant years ahead.
usage: One serving daily with a meal.
warnings: Consult a professional if you take prescription medication.
benefits: Supports cellular vitality and healthy aging.

name: Sun Femme™
shortDescription: Feminine balance for your wellness journey.
warnings: Not during pregnancy. Consult if on hormone therapy.
benefits: Supports hormonal balance and evening calm.

name: Recovery Night™
shortDescription: Restorative support for deeper sleep and calm focus.
warnings: May cause drowsiness. Do not drive after use.
benefits: Supports restful sleep and overnight recovery.

name: Active Boost™
shortDescription: Energy support for your active days.

name: Daily Vital™
benefits: Supports everyday nutrition and steady vitality.
